I have facts, in quote marks by the way, for a reason. There's facts and then there's facts. These are facts because I say so. In some cases they weren't facts when I started saying so. They're facts now. But they're the facts I want people to know, right? I want people to know. These in your list ought to be different. But I want people to know I'm in high demand. I'm turning down all kind of stuff. There's a waiting list. You're like at the end of the list. And if you figure out how to jump the line, God bless you. I want you to know, I want everybody to know that. Everybody. Prospects, new people, public, I want everybody to know that. Which means I gotta work it, having them know it. I want them to know I'm difficult to do business with. It's real important to me. Because by most people's standards I am difficult to do business with. And I want the luxury of being difficult to do business with. I like being difficult to do business with. So I want them to know it. Therefore, when they do business with me and they judge me difficult, I can't say they weren't warned. They already knew. They already got themselves over that by the time they're there to do business with me. I want them to know that I am extremely intolerant of having my time wasted. Why do I want them to know that? So I want to waste my time. I want them to be really, really, really respectful of my time. I want them to know that I will terminate a client. I want to know that I'm not above fire on somebody for bad behavior. And that I can be arbitrary about it. I want them to know that I'm the highest priced guy there is. Why do I want them to know that? To reduce the sticker shock when I quote the feed. It's still there, by the way, but it's not as bad. And if it's really an issue, see if they're not prepared to spend a lot of money, might as well get that out early so they can go someplace else. Because why do I want to talk to them if they're not prepared to spend a lot of money? So I want them to know the highest priced guy. And of course I want them to know that people are making enormous sums of money as a result of hanging around me. Now those are my facts. You may argue if you wish about to what degree they are facts, but that's my facts list. You too need a facts list. And now that facts list, you are consciously, deliberately, strategically reinforcing it every opportunity. Everything you write, every meeting, every phone conversation, every coaching thing, every consulting day, every time you meet with a client, it's almost like at the end of this time together, how many of those facts did I reinforce at least once? Check, check, check, check, check. I don't do that consciously anymore. I don't have to. But you could start doing it consciously. Check list, conversation. Okay, how many of these things did I manage to work into the conversation? It's kind of like I took a Latin in high school, which there's not much you could do that it would be more useless than taking a Latin in high school. But I took a Latin in high school because I thought it was going to be a veterinarian and at that time you needed Latin to get into veterinary medicine school at Ohio State. That's why I took it. But the only thing I remember from Latin is quovatis. So I go to a lot of trouble to work quovatis into conversations and I paid a heavy price to get it. I had a hard time passing a Latin. So I like to see how many times a year I could work quovatis in somewhere because it's like all I got from the whole class. So I make a deliberate sort of intent. I've ingrained it. I do it automatically now just like I just did it. So I managed to work into a $10,000 seminar, a discussion of quovatis. That ain't easy. You got to work at that. Same thing here. How many of the points on your facts list can you work into every conversation, everything you write, every issue of every newsletter, every CD, every coaching session, every time they interact with you so that you're covering the bases again and again and again and again and again. Why do people know these things about me? Because I make sure they know these things about me.
